info.name: Desert Pulse Festival
info.description: A fictional three-day desert music and arts festival combining indie, electronic, hip-hop, workshops, visual installations, and night-time desert experiences.

venue.name: Solar Stage
venue.description: Main open-air stage for headliners and large concerts.

venue.name: Mirage Tent
venue.description: Covered tent focused on electronic, experimental, and late-night sets.

venue.name: Dune Arena
venue.description: Outdoor arena for indie, hip-hop, and alternative shows.

venue.name: Oasis Workshop Dome
venue.description: Small venue for talks, workshops, acoustic sessions, and artist meetings.

performer.name: Lunar Waves
performer.bio: Lunar Waves brings a distinctive electronic sound to the desert, mixing live performance with immersive festival energy.

performer.name: Neon Horizon
performer.bio: Neon Horizon brings a distinctive indie sound to the desert, mixing live performance with immersive festival energy.

performer.name: Desert Echo
performer.bio: Desert Echo brings a distinctive alternative sound to the desert, mixing live performance with immersive festival energy.

performer.bio: Solar Nomads brings a distinctive hip-hop sound to the desert, mixing live performance with immersive festival energy.

performer.bio: Mirage Bloom brings a distinctive experimental sound to the desert, mixing live performance with immersive festival energy.
